planStatuses.PASS: Plan passed independent review and has no known blocking gaps.
planStatuses.PARTIAL: Plan passed, but coverage degraded or open verification remains.
planStatuses.CONDITIONAL: No P0 blocker, but important P1 issues remain and require human judgment.
planStatuses.FAILED_WITH_FINDINGS: Review found blockers or the plan is not reliable enough to implement.
planStatuses.FAILED: Workflow failed before producing a reliable artifact.
planStatuses.NEEDS_CLARIFICATION: Requirement ambiguity blocks a responsible implementation plan.

deliveryStatuses.BLOCKED: Workflow stopped before a safe handoff.
deliveryStatuses.DELIVERED: Delivery produced a verified sandbox diff with no open items.
deliveryStatuses.DELIVERED_WITH_OPEN_ITEMS: Delivery produced a diff, but some verification remains manual or environment-dependent.

publishStatuses.PUBLISH_NEEDS_CHOICE: Stopped before any checkout/switch/branch-create/commit/push because the customer has not explicitly chosen a commit strategy. Re-run with gitPolicy.branchMode set to one of three: 'new-branch' (create a branch off the current branch), 'switch-existing' (switch to the customer-specified existing gitPolicy.targetBranch), or 'current-branch' (commit on the current branch unchanged; legacy 'direct' maps here). The report records the chosen mode, the original branch, the final commit branch, and whether a branch was created or switched. Not a failure; protected-branch / high-risk / sensitive-file / no-force-push rules still apply once a choice is made.
publishStatuses.PUBLISH_BLOCKED: Publish refused by a deterministic gate (delivery not publishable, diff apply-check failed, protected branch without allowMainPush, push not performed, prior block, or a high-risk domain without allowHighRiskAutoPublish).
publishStatuses.PUBLISH_DRYRUN: dryRun: branch and commit prepared, but push intentionally skipped.
publishStatuses.PUBLISH_UNVERIFIED: Pushed, but post-push remote verification did not fully pass (remote SHA / committed files / forbidden files / publish-copy work tree); success is not claimed.
publishStatuses.PUBLISHED: Pushed and independently remote-verified with no open items.
publishStatuses.PUBLISHED_WITH_OPEN_ITEMS: Pushed and remote-verified, but the delivery carried non-blocking open items requiring human follow-up.

autoDeliverStatuses.INVALID_ARGS: Orchestration could not start: required requirement/target argument missing.
autoDeliverStatuses.NEEDS_CLARIFICATION: Readiness gate paused the run and escalated to a human (requirement too ambiguous to implement).
autoDeliverStatuses.BLOCKED_AT_PLAN: Plan did not reach a ready state (needs PASS/PARTIAL + ready); did not enter coding.
autoDeliverStatuses.BLOCKED_AT_DELIVER: Delivery did not reach a publishable state (needs DELIVERED / DELIVERED_WITH_OPEN_ITEMS); did not publish.
autoDeliverStatuses.FAILED: A sub-workflow (plan/deliver/publish) returned no result, or an unexpected error halted orchestration.
autoDeliverStatuses.<publishStatus>: On reaching the publish stage, the overall finalStatus passes through publish-delivery's status (PUBLISH_BLOCKED / PUBLISH_DRYRUN / PUBLISH_UNVERIFIED / PUBLISHED / PUBLISHED_WITH_OPEN_ITEMS).

readinessForDev.ready: A delivery workflow may consume the plan.
readinessForDev.needs-clarification: The requirement is too ambiguous; it must be clarified before any delivery.
readinessForDev.blocked: A prerequisite prevents safe delivery (failed or conditional review, or an unmet precondition).

reviewVerdicts.PASS: No P0 blockers and review criteria are satisfied.
reviewVerdicts.CONDITIONAL_PASS: No P0 blockers, but important unresolved issues remain.
reviewVerdicts.FAIL: One or more blockers make the artifact unreliable.
